title: Determination of Stability Constants of 2--Hydroxy.1-Naphthalidene- 2'-Methyl-4' - Nitraniline Complexes with Co2+, Ni2+, Cu2+  and Zn2+
author: M.S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 6 February 1979, revised 24 September 1979, accepted 19 November 1979  

 Potentiometric studies have been carried out on metal complexes of Co 2+ , Ni 2+ , Cu 2+  and Zn 2+  with 2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene-2'-methyl-4'-nitraniline. The dissocia­tion constants (pK 1  & pK 2 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25°4-0.1° and at an ionic strength 0.1 M  in  75  25 percent (v/v) dioxan-water medium.

 Potentiometric studies have been carried out on metal complexes of Co 2+ , Ni 2+ , Cu 2+  and Zn 2+  with 2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene-2'-methyl-4'-nitraniline. The dissocia­tion constants (pK 1  & pK 2 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25°4-0.1° and at an ionic strength 0.1 M  in  75  25 percent (v/v) dioxan-water medium.
